description: Phase 125 Plan 04 SC-5 — A/B fuzzy corpus, POST-compaction view. Mirrors ab-pre.json prompts 1:1. The actual post-compaction context is computed deterministically at test time by piping the synthetic 6-hour replay fixture through buildTieredExtractor with canned tier2/tier3 outputs (offline; no Haiku). This file documents the contract: the same 20 prompts, the same expected_keywords. The test asserts >=18/20 (>=90%) keyword-survival agreement between pre (raw fixture text) and post (post-pipeline chunks).

prompts.prompt: Which client did Ramy mention this morning?
What client are we doing the term-sheet for?
Whose AUM update went into the deck?
Which client is in clients/Finmentum/?
Which client's tranche needs to be wired?
Who is the primary client today?
What's the status of the $45M close note?
What state is the term-sheet in?
What did the lawyer respond about?
Is the AUM update pushed?
What's pending for the $45M close?
Has the tranche been wired?
What was the state of the Ramy sync?
What rule did Ramy add about deploy?
What rule was added about Friday deploys?
What standing rule did Ramy set?
What's the latest feedback rule on charts?
Did Ramy add any new chart rules?
Did Ramy give any deploy-window rules?
What rules did Ramy add today?
